title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. cantabrica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. cantabrica, also known as the Cantabrian kidney vetch, is a subspecies of perennial herb belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. cantabrica include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially aiding in the healing process of wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
